readinglists-desc: Waxay u oggolaanaysaa isticmaalayaasha inay maareeyaan liisaska gaarka ah ee walxaha, sida calaamadaha bogagga ama liisaska "Bogagga la keydiyay".
readinglists-db-error-no-projects: Mashruucyo looma diiwaangelin isticmaalka Liisaska Akhrinta. Isticmaal qoraalka populateProjectsFromSiteMatrix si aad u diiwaangeliso mashruucyada.
readinglists-db-error-already-set-up: Liisaska akhriska hore ayaa loogu dejiyay isticmaalahan.
readinglists-db-error-cannot-delete-defa: Liiska caadiga ah lama tirtiri karo.
readinglists-db-error-cannot-update-defa: Liiska caadiga ah lama cusboonaysiin karo.
readinglists-db-error-not-own-list: Liiska $1 waxa iska leh isticmaale kale.
readinglists-db-error-not-own-list-entry: Gelitaanka liiska $1 waxa iska leh isticmaale kale.
readinglists-db-error-duplicate-list: Liis magacan leh hore ayuu u jiray.
readinglists-db-error-duplicate-page: Liisku hore ayuu boggan ugu jiraa.
readinglists-db-error-empty-list-ids: Xuduudaha aqoonsiyada liiska waa inaanay madhnayn.
readinglists-db-error-user-required: Habkan lama adeegsan karo iyada oo aan la cayimin isticmaalaha.
readinglists-db-error-list-limit: Isticmaalayaashu ma yeelan karaan wax ka badan $1 {{PLURAL:$1|liis|liisas}}.
readinglists-db-error-entry-limit: Liiska $1 ma yeelan karo wax ka badan $2 {{PLURAL:$2|gelitaan|gelitaanno}}.
readinglists-db-error-too-long: Qiimaha goobta $1 kama dheeraan karo $2 baytyada.
readinglists-browser-add-entry-success: $1 waxa lagu daray [[$2|$3]] adiga kuu gaar ah.
readinglists-browser-remove-entry-succes: $1 waa laga saaray [[$2|$3]] adiga kuu gaar ah.
readinglists-browser-login-prompt: Soo gal si aad u kaydiso bogag
readinglists-browser-enable-sync-prompt: Daar isku xidhka ee app-kaaga Wikipedia si aad u bilowdo kaydinta bogagga
readinglists-browser-list-entry-limit-ex: Bogga lama kaydin karo. Waxaad gaartay xadka $1 ee walxaha halkii liis
readinglists-special-title-imported: Liisaska akhriska: Ka soo dhoofso isticmaale kale
readinglists-description: Dhammaan liisaskaaga la kaydiyay meel keliya.
reading-list-purpose: Fadlan soo gal si aad u aragto liisaskaaga akhriska ee gaarka ah.
reading-list-purpose-for-temp-user: Fadlan samee akoon si aad u abuuri karto liisaska akhriska ee gaarka ah.
readinglists-error: Biraawsarkaaga ma awoodi karo isticmaalka astaanta liisaska akhriska. Fadlan daar JavaScript ama isku day biraawsar kale.
readinglists-import-error: Lama soo bandhigi karo liiska xogta la bixiyay.
readinglists-import-size-error: Liisku aad buu u weyn yahay si loo soo bandhigo.
readinglists-special-error-list-not-foun: Ma geli kartid boggan. Waxaa laga yaabaa inaad ku gashay akoon ka duwan kan ku jira URL-ka.
readinglists-default-description: Liiska caadiga ah ee bogaggaaga la kaydiyay.
readinglists-empty-title: Weli ma jiraan bogag la kaydiyay
readinglists-empty-cta: Isticmaal astaanta kaydinta ee bog kasta si aad ugu darto waxyaabo halkan.
readinglists-sorted-by-recent: Waxaa loo kala saaray kan ugu dambeeyay.
action-action-readinglist-private: Akhriso liisaska akhriska ee isticmaalayaasha kale
readinglists-empty-message: Ma haysid wax liis ah, maxaad u abuuri weyday mid?
readinglists-import-empty-message: Ma soo dhoofin kartid liisas liisas ah.
readinglists-list-empty-message: Liiskan kuma jiraan bogag. Soo deji oo isticmaal app-ka si aad ugu darto waxyaabo liiskan akhriska.
readinglists-watchlist-description: Bogag aad raacdo si aad u aragto wax ka beddel cusub.
readinglists-watchlist-monitor: Waxaad la socon kartaa wax ka beddelka bogagga ku jira liiskan adigoo adeegsanaya qalabka [$1 liiska la socodka].
readinglists-import-app-misconfigured: Websaydhkan hadda ma taageero soo dhoofinta liisaska.
readinglists-import-disclaimer: Isticmaale ku jira goobtan ayaa sameeyay liis akhris oo lala wadaago dadka kale (malaha adiga). Lama kormeero, waxa ku jira ma metelaan tafatirayaasha goobta.
readinglists-share-url-notify: Macluumaadka la xiriira liiskan akhriska ayaa lagu koobiyeeyay sabuuradda.
readinglists-import-app-launch-hint: Fadlan hubi in aad rakibtay nooca ugu dambeeyay ee app-ka.
readinglists-beta-feature-description:
* Waxaad kaydsan kartaa bogag si aad u akhrido ama u tixraacdo mar dambe.
* Bogagga laga kaydiyo app-ka iyo mareegta Wikipedia dhammaantood waxay ku wada-sinxiran doonaan hal liis.

Fadlan ogow:
* Waxaa laga yaabaa inaan ku darno hawlo cusub inta aan ku jirno beta.
* Astaantan beta waxay socon doontaa ilaa Luulyo 2026, ka dibna waxay noqon doontaa astaan si joogto ah looga heli karo Wikipedia. Waxaan soo dhoweynaynaa fikradahaaga adigoo adeegsanaya xiriirinta doodda ee kore.
tooltip-ca-bookmark-add: Ku dar boggan waxyaabahaaga la kaydiyay
tooltip-ca-bookmark-remove: Ka saar boggan waxyaabahaaga la kaydiyay
readinglists-unsave-from-custom-list-bod: Boggan wuxuu ku jiraa hal ama dhowr liis oo akhriskaaga ah ee ku jira app-ka Wikipedia.
readinglists-onboarding-title: Kaydi bogag si aad u akhrido mar dambe
readinglists-onboarding-text: Ma heshay wax xiiso leh? Hadda waxaad ku kaydin kartaa liiskaaga gaarka ah.
readinglists-onboarding-saved-pages-text: Halkan ka gal dhammaan bogaggaaga la kaydiyay.
readinglists-mobile-onboarding-saved-pag: Halkan ka gal dhammaan bogaggaaga la kaydiyay adigoo adeegsanaya liiska.
readinglists-betafeature-quicksurvey-que: Maxaa ka dhigi lahaa mid ka faa'iido badan adiga?
readinglists-cta-dialog-subtitle: Hadda waxaad kaydin kartaa bogagga Wikipedia liiskaaga gaarka ah.
readinglists-cta-dialog-call-to-action: Fadlan soo gal ama samee akoon si aad u bilowdo kaydinta.
